Governed AI factory

Build structured AI projects without chaos.

CodexAtlas helps developers and technical teams bootstrap, audit and certify AI project work with explicit governance.

Start setup Create first project Contact Lucas

What is Atlas?

It is a factory layer for governed Codex work across audits, planning, design and delivery.

Why teams use it

It keeps architecture, branding, copy and execution aligned before risky work reaches production.

How to start

  1. Bootstrap the project.
  2. Audit the repo.
  3. Run the quality gate.

Evidence first

Every recommendation should stay grounded in checks, artifacts and explicit approvals.
